chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-763 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.04.2022 Mr. Ahsan Gul Dahri, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. == The petitioner by way of instant petition has mainly sought for restraint against the respondents from taking possession of a Land which is claimed to be attached with Dargah Peer Gaji Shah Taluka Johi, District Dadu forcibly. If the petitioner is having any right to retain the possession of such land then he could prove such right by approaching the Civil Court having jurisdiction, such right being factual in its nature could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
